name: Goa
tagline: Beach Paradise Living on a Fraction of Western Costs
description: Goa is India's premier coastal retreat, blending Portuguese colonial charm with tropical beaches and an incredibly low cost of living. A thriving expat community, world-class seafood, and a laid-back vibe make it one of the most attractive FIRE destinations in Asia. From the lively beach shacks of North Goa to the quieter coves of the South, retirees can stretch their portfolios further here than almost anywhere else on Earth.

quickFacts.visa: India e-Tourist Visa (up to 5 years); retirement visa not available
quickFacts.safetyRating: Moderate – generally safe for tourists and expats

housing.description: Spacious 2BR apartment or small villa in Anjuna or Mapusa area

dining.description: Beach shack meals and local Goan restaurants 4-5x/week; thalis under $2

healthcare.description: Comprehensive private health insurance with access to Manipal Hospital Goa

transportation.description: Rented scooter or motorbike, the standard Goa transport

entertainment.description: Beach life, yoga classes, night markets, occasional live music events

1M.lifestyle: At this budget you live better than most locals in Goa. A comfortable apartment near the beach, daily restaurant meals of fresh seafood, and plenty left over for hobbies and socializing. The warm expat community and low costs mean your $1M portfolio feels like much more here.

housing.description: Beautiful 3BR villa with pool in Assagao or Vagator

dining.description: Mix of upscale beach restaurants, boutique cafes, and fine dining in Panjim

healthcare.description: Premium private insurance covering top hospitals in Goa and Mumbai

transportation.description: Own scooter plus occasional taxi and ride-hailing for longer trips

entertainment.description: Surfing lessons, premium yoga retreats, weekend trips to spice plantations and waterfalls

2M.lifestyle: Life becomes genuinely luxurious at this level by Goan standards. A private villa with a pool, regular dining at the best restaurants, and the freedom to explore all of Goa's culture and nature without thinking about cost. You can easily travel to other parts of India on weekends.

housing.description: Stunning 4BR luxury villa with pool and garden in Siolim or Candolim

dining.description: Daily fine dining at top restaurants like Bomra's and Gunpowder; regular entertaining

healthcare.description: Top-tier international health insurance with medical evacuation coverage

transportation.description: Own car with driver for daily use, plus scooter for casual trips

entertainment.description: Boat charters to nearby islands, premium wellness retreats, cultural festivals, weekend getaways to Hampi

3M.lifestyle: You are living at the absolute top of Goan society. A palatial villa, a car with driver, dining at every top-tier restaurant, and the means to fly anywhere in India on a whim. At this level you have enormous surplus to reinvest or use for international travel and philanthropy.

housing.description: Oceanfront estate or heritage Portuguese villa with full amenities in prime North Goa

dining.description: Personal chef for daily meals plus fine dining experiences across Goa

healthcare.description: VIP concierge medical service, international coverage including Singapore and Bangkok hospitals

transportation.description: Luxury SUV with full-time driver, plus own scooter for leisure rides

entertainment.description: Private beach parties, art collecting, premium wellness programs, domestic and international travel

domesticHelp.description: Full-time cook, housekeeper, gardener, and part-time driver

luxuryExtras.description: Regular international travel, yacht charters, bespoke experiences, philanthropy in local communities

5M.lifestyle: At $5M in Goa you live like royalty. A stunning estate with a full household staff, a private chef, luxury vehicles, and the ability to jet off to Mumbai, Dubai, or Southeast Asia whenever the mood strikes. Your surplus grows faster than you can spend it.

housing.description: Sprawling beachfront compound or restored Portuguese mansion with guest houses

dining.description: Private chef team, catered events, exclusive dining experiences flown in from Mumbai

healthcare.description: Elite international health plan, personal wellness consultant, annual executive health screening abroad

transportation.description: Multiple luxury vehicles, full-time chauffeur, chartered flights to Mumbai and Delhi

entertainment.description: Private island excursions, art patronage, exclusive cultural events, first-class international travel

domesticHelp.description: Full household staff including chef, butler, housekeepers, gardeners, security, and personal assistant

luxuryExtras.description: Property investments, philanthropy, first-class global travel, yacht ownership, art collection

10M.lifestyle: This budget in Goa is almost absurd in its luxury. You could own multiple properties, employ a full staff, fund local charities, and still have enormous surplus. Most retirees at this level split time between Goa and international destinations, using Goa as a spectacular and affordable home base.
